infoPlist.NSCameraUsageDescription: This app uses the camera to capture and upload media assets.
infoPlist.NSPhotoLibraryUsageDescription: This app accesses the photo library to select and upload images and videos.
infoPlist.NSMicrophoneUsageDescription: This app uses the microphone to record audio assets.
infoPlist.NSLocationWhenInUseUsageDescription: This app uses location to geotag media assets when uploading.

plugins.photosPermission: The app accesses your photos to let you share them with the MAMS platform.
plugins.cameraPermission: The app accesses your camera to let you take photos and upload them to MAMS.

plugins.microphonePermission: Allow MAMS to access your microphone to record audio assets.
